name: Vegetable Curry
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Pound Green Beans, cut into 1-inch lengths
1/2 Pound Broccoli, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute onion until soft.
2. Stir in spices; cook for 1 minute.
3. Add remaining ingredients to the pan.
4. Cover and bring mixture to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and simmer until vegetables are tender, approximately 20 minutes.
6. Remove cover, increase heat, and cook for a few more minutes to reduce pan juices.
7. Serve with rice.
A vegetable curry is much like a vegetable stir-fry: infinitely variable and adaptable to whatever you happen to have in your refrigerator at the moment.
